title: Heap Structure and HeapSort Process
description: A visual representation of a max-heap's binary tree structure and the step-by-step process of the HeapSort algorithm.
relationships: Array elements are mapped to a complete binary tree
Heapify maintains the max-heap property (parent >= children)
Root is swapped with last element of unsorted partition
After swap, heapify is called on the new root to restore heap property
Process repeats until the entire array is sorted
